---
name: Feature Request / New Project Idea
about: Suggest a new project or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Description**
Describe the feature or new project idea.

**Industry Sector**
Which sector does this fit? (Healthcare, Legal, DevOps, Education, Business, etc.)

**Use Case**
Who would use this and why?

**Why Local LLM?**
Why is running this locally (vs cloud) important for this use case?

**Additional Context**
Any references, examples, or mockups.
